rulings.Case Title: BRIAN ROBERTS et al VS. ALFA LAVAL INC SUED INDIVIDUALLLY AND AS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, July 14, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Rockwell Automation, Inc.¿s motion for protective order is denied. The discovery sought by plaintiffs meets the standard of discovery relevance and defendant has not shown that responding to the discovery would impose an undue burden on it. =(220/HEK)
